_note: DEMO SEED — a small hand-picked set of well-known service CLIs mapped to their domains, to validate CLIs as a fourth format in the domain grouping. The real source should be a pipeline over fig autocomplete specs / a maintained CLI registry, not this file.

clis.name: gh
clis.install: brew install gh && gh auth login
clis.description: GitHub's official CLI — repos, issues, PRs, releases, and Actions from the terminal.

clis.name: vercel
clis.description: Deploy, inspect, and manage Vercel projects and deployments.

clis.name: stripe
clis.description: Test webhooks, trigger events, and call the Stripe API from the shell.

clis.name: wrangler
clis.description: Build and deploy Cloudflare Workers, Pages, and bindings.

clis.name: supabase
clis.description: Manage Supabase projects, migrations, and local development.

clis.name: netlify
clis.description: Deploy sites, manage functions, and stream logs on Netlify.

clis.name: heroku
clis.install: brew tap heroku/brew && brew install heroku && heroku login
clis.description: Manage Heroku apps, dynos, add-ons, and releases.

clis.name: doctl
clis.install: brew install doctl && doctl auth init
clis.description: DigitalOcean's CLI for droplets, databases, and app platform.

clis.name: flyctl
clis.install: brew install flyctl && fly auth login
clis.description: Deploy and scale apps on Fly.io's edge platform.

clis.name: railway
clis.description: Deploy and manage services and environments on Railway.

clis.name: pscale
clis.install: brew install planetscale/tap/pscale && pscale auth login
clis.description: Manage PlanetScale databases, branches, and deploy requests.

clis.name: sentry-cli
clis.description: Upload source maps, manage releases, and send events to Sentry.

clis.name: twilio
clis.install: brew tap twilio/brew && brew install twilio && twilio login
clis.description: Manage Twilio numbers, messaging, and serverless functions.

clis.name: doppler
clis.description: Sync secrets and inject them into local and CI environments.

clis.name: ngrok
clis.install: brew install ngrok && ngrok config add-authtoken <token>
clis.description: Expose local servers to the public internet over secure tunnels.

clis.name: gcloud
clis.install: brew install --cask google-cloud-sdk && gcloud auth login
clis.description: Manage Google Cloud resources, IAM, and deployments.

clis.name: aws
clis.description: The AWS command-line interface across every AWS service.

clis.name: az
clis.description: Manage Azure resources, identities, and deployments.

clis.name: linear
clis.description: Create and manage Linear issues and projects from the terminal.

clis.name: shopify
clis.description: Build, test, and deploy Shopify apps and themes.
